artifact_status: Draft - evidence for demo purposes only, not yet approved

automated_scans.version_source: installed via pip into project .venv for this run

manual_review_findings.finding: No authentication or authorization is implemented. Confirmed consistent with source: customer authentication is explicitly out of scope per business-request.md.
manual_review_findings.risk: Not suitable for exposure outside a controlled demo environment.

manual_review_findings.finding: No real customer or shipment data may be used, per SRC-0002. This is a procedural control, not enforced in code (the application performs no PII detection).
manual_review_findings.risk: Relies on operator discipline; not technically enforced.

manual_review_findings.finding: The service makes no outbound calls (no InfoAXS integration exists in this phase) and has no persistence layer, minimizing attack surface.

All inbound fields are validated by Pydantic type coercion plus explicit business-rule checks (BR-01-BR-08) before use; no dynamic code execution, file access, or SQL/command construction occurs anywhere in the application code.
The application requires no secrets, API keys, or credentials, since it has no external integrations in this phase.
The primary source document for this build (business-request.md) is not registered in registers/source-register.csv, so the security review itself rests on an ungoverned input.
manual_review_findings.risk: Low direct security impact, but a process/traceability gap.

known_gaps: This review is limited to static analysis (bandit) and dependency vulnerability lookup (pip-audit) plus manual read-through. No dynamic testing (DAST), fuzzing, or penetration testing was performed - explicitly out of scope per business request (no performance/production testing).
PII/data-sensitivity control (SEC-02) is procedural only and unverified by tooling.
